behavior_in_task_description.reason: All asserted names (module path, _CHART_TYPE_ADAPTERS, VALID_CHART_TYPES, _CHART_EXAMPLES, _get_chart_type_schema_impl, get_chart_type_schema, chart type keys, response keys, __init__ export, app.py registration) are explicitly named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required symbols/behavior but doesn't provide the full implementation code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check structural patterns (dict keys, function signatures, presence of strings) that any reasonable implementation would satisfy.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests use py_compile subprocess and ast parsing in addition to regex text checks, verifying compilability and AST structure.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require at least 7 TypeAdapter calls, sorted() usage, include_examples parameter via AST, docstring >20 chars — a stub cannot pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all required behaviors: module existence, exports, app registration, adapter dict, VALID_CHART_TYPES sorted, impl function, invalid chart type error response, conditional examples, examples dict, public function + docstring.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped into named classes (TestGetChartTypeSchemaBehavioral, TestGetChartTypeSchemaExported, etc.) with descriptive docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Response dict keys (chart_type, schema, examples, error, valid_chart_types, hint) are documented in instruction.md.

no_typos.reason: Paths and symbol names are consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction targets files appropriate to the task scope; no gratuitous line-level hints.
